label: 🎨 Themes & Appearance
description: Make VS Code look exactly how you want it

extensions.name: GitHub Theme
extensions.description: The official GitHub dark and light themes. Clean and very familiar.

extensions.name: Dracula Official
extensions.description: The legendary dark theme used by millions of developers worldwide.

extensions.name: Tokyo Night
extensions.description: A dark elegant theme inspired by Tokyo at night. Very popular in the community.

extensions.name: Night Owl
extensions.description: Designed for night-owl developers. Perfect contrast, easy on eyes.

extensions.name: Material Icon Theme
extensions.description: Adds beautiful icons to every file type and folder in the explorer.

extensions.name: VSCode Icons
extensions.description: Over 1000 icons for files and folders — a great alternative to Material Icons.

extensions.name: Custom CSS & JS Loader
extensions.description: Apply custom CSS to VS Code itself — change fonts, add blur effects, make it truly yours.

extensions.name: Peacock
extensions.description: Colors each VS Code window differently per project. Essential when juggling multiple repos.
